description: README cites bare 'SPEC §N' but there is no top-level SPEC.md — there are three docs/SPEC-*.md files with independent section numbering. 'SPEC §11' is doubly ambiguous: SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md §11 is Hand-edit workflow, SPEC-lifecycle-sync-participants.md §11 is Config inheritance, and the README uses §11 for BOTH. Qualify every 'SPEC §' citation with its filename so a reader can open the right doc directly. Docs-only, surfaced as a follow-up note from bl-41ee.
title: Docs: disambiguate README 'SPEC §' refs to their spec files
